open_source.summary: Provides the Console component, styling, and icon system.

open_source.summary: Provides the Markdown editor used in the Console chat input.

open_source.name: unified
open_source.summary: Runs the Markdown renderer processing pipeline.

open_source.name: remark-parse
open_source.summary: Parses Markdown source text into a syntax tree.

open_source.name: remark-gfm
open_source.summary: Adds GFM features such as tables and task lists.

open_source.name: remark-math
open_source.summary: Parses block and inline math syntax.

open_source.name: remark-rehype
open_source.summary: Converts the Markdown syntax tree into an HTML syntax tree.

open_source.name: rehype-raw
open_source.summary: Brings raw HTML inside Markdown into the same processing chain.

open_source.name: rehype-stringify
open_source.summary: Serializes the processed HTML syntax tree into final HTML.

open_source.name: rehype-katex
open_source.summary: Turns math nodes into KaTeX HTML output.

open_source.name: DOMPurify
open_source.summary: Sanitizes final HTML before it is rendered.

open_source.summary: Renders Mermaid diagram blocks in Markdown.

open_source.name: KaTeX
open_source.summary: Renders mathematical formulas.

open_source.summary: Provides code syntax highlighting.

open_source.name: Shiki Stream
open_source.summary: Supports streamed syntax-highlighting token output.

open_source.summary: Renders Graphviz and DOT diagrams.
